|desc=Grandpa Forest (Japanese: '''{{tt|森|もり}}のおじいちゃん''' ''Grandpa Forest'') is a {{p|Drampa}} that Lana and {{an|Mallow}} met when they were young. Years later, they met Drampa again after hearing about [[Harper and Sarah]]'s encounter with it.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Wild
|pkmn=Dewpider
|type1=Water
|type2=Bug
|img=Dewpider anime.png
|epnum=SM071
|epname=Dewpider Ascending!
|vajp=Toru Sakurai
|vaen=Martha Harms
|desc=Lana encountered {{p|Dewpider}} when its bubble popped. Dewpider developed a crush on Lana after seeing a bubble on her head. Having been told by its parent {{p|Araquanid}} to go out to find a new home and getting separated from the rest of its group, Dewpider found itself a home.

Dewpider's moves are {{m|Bubble}}, {{m|Bubble Beam}}, {{m|Spider Web}}, and {{m|Mirror Coat}}.}}
